items.title: Logitech Wave Keys wireless ergonomic keyboard with cushioned palm rest is now within $1.50 of its all-time low at $52.50
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Logitech’s Wave Keys wireless ergonomic in Graphite down to $52.49 shipped. This is originally a $60 unit, that has been fetching close to $70 since it jumped up in price around the same time last year. Today’s deal delivers a 25% markdown, shaving $17.50 off its usual going rate. Only once before today have we seen this particular keyboard go for less, and it’s now within just $1.50 that all-time low. You can also get this in Off-White and Rose finishes, although they’re both fetching $60 right now with a relatively lighter deal. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: Early Amazon Big Spring Sale offers now live on eero mesh Wi-Fi system range: Deals on eero 7, Pro, Max, and more from $55
items.summary:
As part of its early Spring sale offers, Amazon is currently offering some solid deals across a wide range of its eero mesh Wi-Fi systems, with discounts available on everything from the standard eero 6 routers to the latest eero 7 and the Outdoor 7 units. One of the more notable deals of the lot drops a single node of the eero 7 mesh Wi-Fi 7 system down to $139.99 shipped. This 2025 Wi-Fi 7 mesh router typically goes for $170, which it maintains for the most part, besides a few drops during the big sale events. It dropped to $128 during the Black Friday sale last year, and it’s now within just $12 of that all-time low. The triple-node eero 7 systems are also on sale, currently down to $290 shipped. Head below for more details, along with deals on the entire eero Wi-Fi lineup.

items.title: Save hundreds on Segway e-scooters during this Spring Sale event, like the Max G2 at $650 (Reg. $1,000), more from $150
items.summary:
Segway has launched its official Spring Sale with up to 55% discounts, giving folks even lower prices than its usual discounts so you can secure your new ride and start your spring adventures off right. One notable price cut is hitting Segway’s popular MAX G2 Electric Scooter and dropping it to $649.99 shipped, matching its Amazon pricing. You may see it bearing a $1,400 MSRP tag, but that rate is usually reduced to $1,000, with most of the discounts over the last year having kept prices above $750, with occasional drops to $700, less frequent falls to $650 (last seen during Christmas sales), and the one-time-only cut to a $530 that happened for a single day in December. Today’s deal gives you the next-best price from that low, saving you $350 off the going rate and even beating out its Black Friday pricing. Head below to learn why this model is so popular among riders, and also to browse the full lineup of deals.
